# API reference (northbound HTTP)

The complete northbound HTTP surface of the gateway ‚Äî every registered route grouped by router file, with its method, full `/api`-prefixed path, the inline auth/RBAC gate, and the one-line description from the route's own source comment. This is **generated** from the route source and kept honest by a CI drift guard, so it cannot lie about the code.

> This complements ‚Äî it does not duplicate ‚Äî the OpenAPI spec (`lib/api-spec/openapi.yaml`), which is the **codegen contract** deliberately scoped to the core CRUD the SPA client consumes. This page is the full surface (admin, security, setup, AI, SCIM, auth, costing, feature-config).

> **Optional browser portal.** The same surface renders as a self-contained, searchable HTML page at `GET /api/docs` ‚Äî **off by default**, exposed only when `API_PORTAL_ENABLED` is set (it 404s otherwise, so a deployment that doesn't want its route map browsable never exposes it). It is a documentation page: it makes no calls and holds no data.

## Authentication & roles

- **Session cookie** ‚Äî OIDC (also SAML, OAuth2, magic-link, demo); signed httpOnly; full read + write. Cookie-authed mutations pass a CSRF guard.
- **Read-only API token** ‚Äî `Authorization: Bearer <t>` or `X-API-Key: <t>` (`API_TOKENS`); **GET only** (mutations ‚Üí 403), maps to the viewer grant, optionally programme-scoped.
- **Out-of-band secrets** (not the user ladder): `SCIM_TOKEN` for `/api/scim/v2/*`, `NOTIFY_INGEST_SECRET` for `/api/notifications/ingest`, `BREAK_GLASS_TOKEN` for `/api/break-glass/*`.
- **Role ladder** ‚Äî viewer < contributor < manager, plus two orthogonal authorities **pmo** (business governance) and **admin** (technical config); pmo/admin also require strong (WebAuthn) MFA in real-SSO mode. See [`ops/ROLES.md`](ops/ROLES.md).

The **Gate** column shows gates declared inline on the route. Most routes additionally sit behind the `requireAuth` baseline (a valid session or read-only token) applied at mount; a blank gate on a non-public route still requires an authenticated session. Deeper semantics: [`ops/RAW-API.md`](ops/RAW-API.md), [`MCP.md`](MCP.md), [`SSO-SCIM.md`](SSO-SCIM.md), [`CONTRACT.md`](CONTRACT.md) (the separate southbound broker contract).

### `artifacts/api-server/src/routes/ai-providers.ts`

Typed + bounded schemas for the admin write bodies (untrusted boundary input).

| Method | Path | Gate | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/api/ai/providers` | requireRole(admin) | GET /api/ai/providers ‚Äî the registry + capability map (no secrets) |
| GET | `/api/ai/providers/rollback` | requireRole(admin) | One-generation undo availability for the last provider/mapping change (read). |
| POST | `/api/ai/providers/rollback` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | POST /api/ai/providers/rollback ‚Äî one-generation undo for the last provider/mapping change; same admin + step-up gate as the writes it reverses. |
| POST | `/api/ai/providers` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | POST /api/ai/providers ‚Äî add / update a provider entity (admin + step-up). |
| DELETE | `/api/ai/providers/:id` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | DELETE /api/ai/providers/:id ‚Äî remove an entity + its key (admin + step-up). |
| PUT | `/api/ai/providers/:id/key` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | PUT /api/ai/providers/:id/key ‚Äî store an API key in the vault (write-only). |
| DELETE | `/api/ai/providers/:id/key` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | DELETE /api/ai/providers/:id/key ‚Äî remove a stored key (admin + step-up). |
| PUT | `/api/ai/capabilities/:cap` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | PUT /api/ai/capabilities/:cap ‚Äî set the ordered provider list for a capability (admin + step-up). |

### `artifacts/api-server/src/routes/approvals.ts`

Approval-chain endpoints ‚Äî the human, passkey-signed approver surface (design ¬ß3‚Äì4).

| Method | Path | Gate | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| POST | `/api/approvals/passkey` | ‚Äî | POST /approvals/passkey ‚Äî register this user's passkey PUBLIC key (from the browser's create ceremony). |
| GET | `/api/approvals/passkey` | ‚Äî | GET /approvals/passkey ‚Äî this user's registered passkeys (metadata only, never key material secrets). |
| POST | `/api/approvals/passkey/revoke` | requireRole(pmo) | Revocation (admin/PMO governance) POST /approvals/passkey/revoke ‚Äî revoke a NAMED user's passkeys (compromise, role change, suspension). |
| POST | `/api/approvals/passkey/revoke-all` | requireRole(pmo) | POST /approvals/passkey/revoke-all ‚Äî revoke EVERYONE's passkeys (emergency reset). |
| GET | `/api/approvals/inbox` | ‚Äî | GET /approvals/inbox ‚Äî proposals awaiting THIS caller's decision. |
| POST | `/api/approvals/:id/challenge` | ‚Äî | POST /approvals/:id/challenge ‚Äî issue a one-time challenge to sign the current stage. |
| POST | `/api/approvals/:id/decision` | ‚Äî | POST /approvals/:id/decision ‚Äî submit a passkey-signed approve/reject. |
| POST | `/api/approvals/:id/redirect` | requireRole(pmo) | PMO escape hatches (pmo+ only) POST /approvals/:id/redirect ‚Äî reassign the current stage's approvers. |
| POST | `/api/approvals/:id/bypass/challenge` | requireRole(pmo) | POST /approvals/:id/bypass/challenge ‚Äî challenge for a PMO bypass signature. |
| POST | `/api/approvals/:id/bypass` | requireRole(pmo) | POST /approvals/:id/bypass ‚Äî force-approve the chain with a PMO passkey signature (never silent). |
| GET | `/api/approvals/workflow-acceptances` | requireRole(manager) | GET /approvals/workflow-acceptances ‚Äî every stored acceptance with its LIVE active/void status (pmo+). |
| POST | `/api/approvals/workflow-acceptances/:workflowId/challenge` | ‚Äî | POST /approvals/workflow-acceptances/:workflowId/challenge ‚Äî challenge to sign, bound to the CURRENT version. |
| POST | `/api/approvals/workflow-acceptances/:workflowId` | ‚Äî | POST /approvals/workflow-acceptances/:workflowId ‚Äî record the passkey-signed acceptance (scope owner only). |
| DELETE | `/api/approvals/workflow-acceptances/:workflowId` | ‚Äî | DELETE /approvals/workflow-acceptances/:workflowId ‚Äî revoke the grant (strengthens ‚Üí immediate; scope owner). |

### `artifacts/api-server/src/routes/defs.ts`

THE DEFINITION IMPORTER routes (roadmap X.3), behind the default-off `defImporter` module.

| Method | Path | Gate | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| POST | `/api/defs/validate` | requireRole(contributor) | POST /api/defs/validate ‚Äî dry-run: validate a payload by kind without writing (contributor+). |
| GET | `/api/defs/policy` | requireRole(viewer) | GET /api/defs/policy ‚Äî the per-scope write policy (viewer+ may read it; the UI shows what each scope needs). |
| PUT | `/api/defs/policy` | requireRole(admin) | PUT /api/defs/policy ‚Äî change who may write at each scope (admin only ‚Äî altering the permission model). |
| GET | `/api/defs` | requireRole(viewer) | their private area, the org area, and the requested project's area (when in scope). |
| GET | `/api/defs/resolved/:kind` | requireRole(viewer) | (Two path segments after /defs, so it never collides with the one-segment /defs/:id.) |
| GET | `/api/defs/:id` | requireRole(viewer) | GET /api/defs/:id ‚Äî one stored def with its payload (viewer+, subject to the target gate). |

### `artifacts/api-server/src/routes/goals.ts`

Dedupe TTL for a fired check-in reminder ‚Äî long enough that a period's nudge fires once.

| Method | Path | Gate | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/api/goals` | requireRole(viewer) | GET /api/goals?projectId= ‚Äî goals (key results omitted) across every accessible store (viewer+). |
| GET | `/api/goals/:id` | requireRole(viewer) | GET /api/goals/:id ‚Äî one goal with its key results (viewer+). |
| POST | `/api/goals` | requireRole(contributor) | POST /api/goals ‚Äî create a goal in the chosen storage target (contributor+). |
| PUT | `/api/goals/:id` | requireRole(contributor) | PUT /api/goals/:id ‚Äî update a goal in place (contributor+); progress is recomputed from the key results. |
| POST | `/api/goals/:id/checkin` | requireRole(contributor) | optionally set status + a note, and append a bounded history entry (contributor+; org goal ‚áí manager+). |
| POST | `/api/goals/:id/links` | requireRole(contributor) | POST /api/goals/:id/links ‚Äî link a work item to the goal (reference-only, idempotent) (contributor+). |
| DELETE | `/api/goals/:id/links/:key` | requireRole(contributor) | DELETE /api/goals/:id/links/:key ‚Äî unlink a work item by its link key (contributor+). |
| POST | `/api/goals/checkins/sweep` | requireRole(pmo) | and rolls the cadence forward so it recurs. |
| DELETE | `/api/goals/:id` | requireRole(contributor) | DELETE /api/goals/:id ‚Äî remove a goal (contributor+; an org goal additionally needs manager+). |

### `artifacts/api-server/src/routes/setup/config-io.ts`

Setup config-I/O plane ‚Äî moving durable gateway config in and out: env/compose/k8s export, the config-directory summary + hot-reload/backup controls, the config bundle ZIP, the portable snapshot/restore, and the dev-only debug bundle.

| Method | Path | Gate | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/api/setup/instance-key` | requireRole(admin) | GET /api/setup/instance-key ‚Äî status: whether it's available, already revealed, and its non-secret fingerprint. |
| POST | `/api/setup/instance-key/reveal` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | POST /api/setup/instance-key/reveal ‚Äî ONE-TIME reveal of the raw key (base64) for the operator to save. |
| POST | `/api/setup/instance-key/rotate` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | POST /api/setup/instance-key/rotate ‚Äî mint + reveal a fresh key (invalidates the old for future backups). |
| GET | `/api/setup/portable-backup` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | GET /api/setup/portable-backup ‚Äî the complete backup sealed under the IRK (ciphertext only). |
| POST | `/api/setup/portable-restore` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | POST /api/setup/portable-restore ‚Äî { bundle, key } ‚Äî decrypt the portable backup with the OLD key the operator saved, apply both halves, then ROTATE to a fresh key and return it (the "same reveal screen"). |
| GET | `/api/setup/export` | requireRole(admin) | settings, so the operator can persist it in their environment. |
| GET | `/api/setup/config-dir` | requireRole(admin) | `.old` backup's age ‚Äî the SPA nudges the admin to clear it out once `stale`. |
| POST | `/api/setup/config-dir/refresh` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | running on a half-applied broken config. |
| POST | `/api/setup/config-dir/clear-backup` | requireRole(admin) | to live behaviour. |
| GET | `/api/setup/config-bundle` | requireRole(admin) | effective config as the exact folder-of-JSON the loader reads (read ‚â° dump). |
| GET | `/api/setup/snapshot` | requireRole(admin) | GET /api/setup/snapshot ‚Äî download a portable JSON backup of gateway config. |
| POST | `/api/setup/restore` | requireRole(admin) | port/setup). |
| GET | `/api/setup/defs-export` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | plaintext the operator secures. |
| POST | `/api/setup/defs-import` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | Admin + a fresh step-up (a bulk write to every customer store), audited with the per-collection report. |
| GET | `/api/setup/full-backup` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | backup + your keys = the whole system state"). |
| POST | `/api/setup/config-diff` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | every store to build the live side ‚Äî same surface as the export); read-only + content-free (no secrets emitted). |
| POST | `/api/setup/full-restore` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | a fresh step-up, audited. |
| GET | `/api/setup/debug-bundle` | requireRole(admin) | mode (refused in production ‚Äî dev mode is hard-gated off there), admin-only. |

### `artifacts/api-server/src/routes/setup/connections.ts`

Setup connections plane ‚Äî the broker-facing wiring surface: the non-destructive broker/webhook reachability + capability probes, the vendor-credential templates + delegated-vault relay, and the n8n workflow generation/verification.

| Method | Path | Gate | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| POST | `/api/setup/test-broker` | requireRole(admin) | a candidate broker webhook URL (does NOT change settings). |
| GET | `/api/setup/connections` | requireRole(admin) | credential NAMES + placeholders; OmniProject never holds the secret values. |
| POST | `/api/setup/connections/test` | requireRole(admin) | backend with its configured credentials. |
| POST | `/api/setup/connections/vault` | requireRole(admin) + requireStepUp | OmniProject (not stored, not logged). |
| POST | `/api/setup/generate-workflow` | requireRole(admin) | is a workflow that cannot mutate the backend even before anyone reviews it. |
| POST | `/api/setup/verify-workflow` | requireRole(admin) | touches the backend; only read/declarative actions are probed regardless. |

### `artifacts/api-server/src/routes/setup/environments.ts`

Setup environments plane ‚Äî the sandbox ‚Üí promote ‚Üí rollback lifecycle over versioned config: list/create/activate environments, promote one env's config onto another, pin a known-good version, and fast-rollback.

| Method | Path | Gate | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| GET | `/api/setup/environments` | requireRole(admin) | Redis-backed, else this replica's local history). |
| POST | `/api/setup/environments` | requireRole(admin) | POST /api/setup/environments { name } ‚Äî create a sandbox (clone of active). |
| POST | `/api/setup/environments/activate` | requireRole(admin) | POST /api/setup/environments/activate { name } ‚Äî switch the active environment. |
| POST | `/api/setup/promote` | requireRole(admin) | POST /api/setup/promote { from, to } ‚Äî copy one env's config onto another. |
| POST | `/api/setup/versions/:id/known-good` | requireRole(admin) | POST /api/setup/versions/:id/known-good ‚Äî pin a version as known-good. |
| POST | `/api/setup/rollback` | requireRole(admin) | POST /api/setup/rollback { versionId? , toKnownGood? } ‚Äî fast rollback. |
